strings.mainDescription: Use the following form to submit the details of your Early Action Protocols (EAP) submission.
strings.failureMessage: Sorry could not create a new Full EAP right now!
strings.successMessage: Successfully created a new Full EAP!
strings.updateFailure: Sorry could not update Full EAP right now!
strings.updateSuccess: Successfully updated a new Full EAP!
strings.submitFailedSuccess: Failed to submit the EAP for approval!
strings.readOnlyWarningMessage: You’re viewing this form in read-only mode. Editing is currently disabled.
strings.validationErrorAlertMessage: Please fix all the errors before continuing!
strings.submitFormErrorMessage: Please make sure you've filled in all the required details before proceeding!
strings.submitConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to submit the EAP? Reviewers will be notified and you'll no longer be able to edit the form!
strings.formLoadErrorTitle: Failed to load Full EAP form!
strings.formLoadErrorHelpText: Please make sure that the Full EAP form with given id exists and you have the permission to view it
